label: Watch activity filter (tx age)
description: Reads `{ activity, latest, count }` JSON from a row variable (e.g. from bscWatchReadActivity or solanaWatchReadActivity). Keeps rows whose on-chain time is within **maxAgeSec** seconds of now. Solana uses **targetBlockTimeUnix**; BSC uses **timeStamp** (Unix seconds from BscScan). Rows with no block time are **dropped** unless **Pass rows without block time** is checked. Writes the same JSON shape to **saveResultVariable**.
